name: rundock-editor-vendor
description: Pre-bundled Tiptap + tiptap-markdown + js-yaml for Rundock's file editor. Runs out of band of Rundock's main package.json so vendor deps stay isolated.

scripts.build: esbuild ./build-entry.js --bundle --format=esm --target=es2022 --outfile=tiptap-bundle.mjs --footer:js="// See tiptap-bundle.licenses.txt for third-party notices" && node ./collect-licenses.js > tiptap-bundle.licenses.txt
